creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Whilst the MASTER_SITE has gone (it would appear that the author has
left that particular school), there seems to be a pretty good
alternate mirror (as shown by freshmeat) at:

	ftp://koala.inria.fr/pub/games/znibbles/

I grabbed that copy, and it compiled and ran fine on my box here, so
we could just change the MASTER_SITE and let it live.

However, if you really want this to die, let me know, and I'll
go kill it.

-aDe

-- 
Ade Lovett, Austin, TX.
